vocab.che parlava proprio di: that was exactly about; that talked specifically about

vocab.successo: success; happened (note: can mean 'success' as a noun or 'happened' as past participle of 'succedere')

vocab.vi voglio parlare: I want to talk to you (plural)

vocab.commentiamolo: let's comment on it; let's discuss it

vocab.è bene: it is good; it is advisable
vocab.criticità: critical points; issues; problems (note: refers to difficulties or challenges)
vocab.si possono incontrare: can be encountered; can be met (note: impersonal construction, 'one can encounter')

vocab.al proprio obiettivo: to one's own goal; to your goal
vocab.al proprio progetto: to one's own project; to your project

vocab.chiudere: to finish; to complete; to close (in climbing: to send/finish a route)

vocab.flashare: to flash (climbing term: to complete on first try with prior info)
vocab.chiudere a vista: to onsight (climbing term: to complete on first try without prior info)

vocab.si cerca di: one tries to; people try to
vocab.sapersi: to know how to (reflexive; knowing oneself how to)

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

vocab.in catena: at the anchor; at the chain (climbing context)
vocab.si arriva: one arrives; you arrive; we arrive (impersonal/reflexive)
vocab.ci si fa calare: one lets oneself be lowered; you get lowered (impersonal/reflexive, climbing context)

vocab.quello di: that of; the one of (used to introduce an infinitive purpose)

vocab.in maniera: in a way; in a manner

vocab.in catena: on the anchor; on the chain (climbing context)
vocab.la seconda ripetizione: the second repetition; the second go (climbing context)
vocab.ci si fa calare: one lowers oneself; you get lowered (impersonal/reflexive construction)

vocab.questa: this (feminine, refers to something previously mentioned)

vocab.si dovrebbe: one should; you should; it should (impersonal construction)
vocab.cadere: fall; fail (in context: to reach failure in exercise)

vocab.si cerca di: one tries to; we try to (impersonal construction)
vocab.andare a cedimento: go to failure; reach failure (fitness context)

vocab.ecco: here is; here are; look; so (attention-getter)

vocab.riposi: rests; resting points (context: climbing, pauses to rest)

vocab.si vola: you fly; you explode (figurative, meaning to give your all)
vocab.lo associamo a: we associate it with; we pair it with

vocab.un po' più: a bit more; a little more

vocab.approfondirlo: to deepen it; to explore it further
vocab.stiamo svolgendo: we are carrying out; we are performing

vocab.ci fa venire: makes us get; causes us to have
vocab.la ghisa: muscle soreness; muscle stiffness (lit. 'the iron', slang for muscle fatigue)

vocab.non ci danno più: no longer give us; don't provide us anymore

vocab.il tiro: the shot; the attempt (context: effort, action)

vocab.cardiocircolatoria: cardiocirculatory (relating to heart and blood circulation)

vocab.quello: that one; the one (note: refers back to a previously mentioned thing)

vocab.bulder: bouldering (note: 'bulder' is a misspelling of 'boulder' or 'bouldering')

vocab.metabolismo anaerobico alattacido: alactic anaerobic metabolism (anaerobic metabolism without lactic acid)
vocab.metabolismo anaerobico lattacido: lactic anaerobic metabolism (anaerobic metabolism with lactic acid)
vocab.ha comunque un'influenza: still has an influence; nevertheless has an influence
vocab.ci stiamo: we are there; we are (in it) (note: 'ci stiamo' is an idiomatic expression meaning 'we are present/involved')

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to
we manage to; we are able to
vocab.bulder: bouldering (note: 'bulder' is a misspelling of 'boulder' or 'bouldering')

vocab.in falesia: on crag; on cliff (sport climbing outdoors)

vocab.il metabolismo anaerobico lattacido: the anaerobic lactic metabolism (note: specific metabolic pathway)

vocab.siamo lavorando: we are working (out); we are working

vocab.smaltire: to get rid of; to dispose of

vocab.andiamo a: we go to; we are going to (used to indicate intention or immediate future)

vocab.flash: flash (climbing term: with prior info but first try)
vocab.tiro: pitch (climbing term: section of a route)

vocab.tenere duro: hold on; persevere; tough it out (idiomatic: to endure or persist)

vocab.flash: flash (climbing term; successful first attempt with prior info)

vocab.a vista: onsight (climbing term: without prior practice or information)

vocab.saper: know how to; be able to
vocab.per capire: to understand; in order to understand
vocab.in maniera bella veloce: in a nice fast way; really quickly

vocab.un po' più: a bit more; a little more

vocab.sghisare: to release quickly (slang; in sports, to let go or flick)

vocab.per forza di cose: necessarily; inevitably (lit. by force of things)
vocab.il cedimento: the collapse; the failure; the giving in

vocab.si sono venuti a sviluppare: have developed; have come to develop (reflexive, passive construction)
vocab.sia: both; as well as; and also (correlative conjunction)

vocab.a livello di: at the level of; in the area of

vocab.come già detto: as already said; as already mentioned

vocab.farmi sapere: let me know; make me know (lit.)

vocab.avuto modo di: had a chance to; had an opportunity to

vocab.della resistenza: of resistance; of stamina (note: 'resistenza' can mean physical stamina or resistance)
vocab.ad iscrivervi: to subscribe; to sign up (note: 'iscrivervi' is 'subscribe yourselves')
vocab.a mettere: to put; to give (note: often used as 'to give a like', context needed)

vocab.venitemi a trovare: come visit me; come find me

vocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other
